organisation_name.label: Name der Organisation
organisation_name.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

organisation_typ.label: Typ der Organisation
organisation_typ.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

telefon.description: A valid telephone number (or `null`/`None`). Might include country prefix and should include area code.

hausnummer.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

website.label: Website
website.description: An URL value according to RFC 3986 (or `null`/`None`).

beschreibung.label: Beschreibung der Organisation
beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

veranstalter.label: Veranstalter (E-Mail-Adresse)
veranstalter.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Veranstalter' with the id `6a315b1e3b0ba0a7a2d28905` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6a315b1e3b0ba0a7a2d28905/records/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

titel.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

beschreibung_veranstaltung.label: Beschreibung
beschreibung_veranstaltung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

kategorie.label: Kategorie
kategorie.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

beginn.label: Beginn (Datum & Uhrzeit)
beginn.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value datetime values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

ende.label: Ende (Datum & Uhrzeit)
ende.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value datetime values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

anmeldefrist.label: Anmeldefrist
anmeldefrist.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

veranstaltungsort_plz.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

veranstaltungsort_ort.label: Ort
veranstaltungsort_ort.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

veranstaltungsort_geo.label: Standort auf der Karte
veranstaltungsort_geo.description:
A geographical location consisting of latitude, longitude and additional information (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be an object with the keys `lat` (latitude as decimal degrees),
`long` (longitude as decimal degrees) and `info` (additional information as a string).

For example: `{"lat": 51.313056, "long": -0.601944, "info": "Woking, Woking Borough, Surrey, England"}`.

kosten.label: Kosten / Eintritt
kosten.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

flyer.label: Bild / Flyer
flyer.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/6a315b225049324bae74cc15/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6a315b225049324bae74cc15/records/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.
